metadata.description: PostGIS data for Kensington Ave buildings

notes.srid_info: building_assessment.geom is SRID 4326; footprints and massing are SRID 2952. Spatial joins used ST_Transform.
notes.field_surveys: field_establishments joined spatially (ST_DWithin 0.0003 deg ~30m). field_vacant_buildings and field_observations had no matches near Kensington Ave.

building_assessment.query: Buildings on Kensington Ave from building_assessment
